AssessmentRecommendations.Title: Instance-level features require review before migration to Azure SQL Managed Instance
AssessmentRecommendations.Impact: Azure SQL Managed Instance preserves broad SQL Server compatibility, but instance-scoped features, jobs, and integrations still need workload-specific review before migration.
AssessmentRecommendations.Recommendation: Review SQL Agent jobs, server-level objects, and external integrations before migration to confirm they are supported and correctly configured on Azure SQL Managed Instance.

ImpactedObjects.Name: [msdb].[dbo].[SampleNightlyLoadJob]
ImpactedObjects.ImpactDetail: SQL Agent job [msdb].[dbo].[SampleNightlyLoadJob] should be reviewed for dependencies on local file paths, CmdExec steps, and external connectivity before migration.

AssessmentRecommendations.Title: External file and network dependencies should be validated for Azure SQL Managed Instance
AssessmentRecommendations.Impact: Database workloads that rely on local file paths, network shares, or external endpoints often need configuration changes during migration.
AssessmentRecommendations.Recommendation: Validate file access patterns, agent-job execution context, and external connectivity requirements as part of Azure SQL Managed Instance migration planning.

ImpactedObjects.Name: [dbo].[SampleExportProcedure]
ImpactedObjects.ImpactDetail: StoredProcedure [dbo].[SampleExportProcedure] should be reviewed for file-export or network-share dependencies before migration.

FeatureParityRecommendations.Title: Instance-level features require workload-specific validation on Azure SQL Managed Instance
FeatureParityRecommendations.Impact: Server-level configuration and automation features were detected in the assessed workload.
FeatureParityRecommendations.Recommendation: Review server-level objects and automation dependencies before migration to Azure SQL Managed Instance.

FeatureParityRecommendations.Title: External dependencies should be validated for Azure SQL Managed Instance
FeatureParityRecommendations.Impact: External file, job, or network dependencies were detected in the assessed workload.
FeatureParityRecommendations.Recommendation: Validate dependency behavior and operational controls before migration to Azure SQL Managed Instance.
